name: Joe Muranyi
abstract: Joseph P. Muranyi (January 14, 1928 – April 20, 2012) was an American jazz clarinetist, producer and critic.

interviews.title: Joe Muranyi interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007

concerts.label: The Folk and Jazz Wing Ding: Nina Simone, Herbie Mann and Others
JVC Jazz Festival: For the Love of Louis

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Giordano
about_quotes.evidence: I took a gig at a record company, in fact Joe Muranyi was here and it was the same company, it was the RCA Victor Company.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Giordano interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Napoleon
about_quotes.evidence: I saw a friend of mine who was a distributor. Joe Muranyi sent me this, the clarinet player, he sent me this.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Napoleon interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York, New York, January 16, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Art Hodes
about_quotes.evidence: I called Joe Muranyi. And we're talking about $500 a week. I couldn't budge him.
